title: Smelt Bottles In To Glass
description: Smelt empty bottles in to glass! Can be handy?
body:
**🔮Description:**

Tired of wasting glass bottles? This simple but handy mod lets you smelt empty glass bottles back into usable glass blocks in a furnace. Recycle, save resources, and make your crafting more efficient!
Features:
Smelt any empty glass bottle into 1 glass block.

Compatible with vanilla furnaces and mods adding furnaces.

Lightweight and easy to install.

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4df155da6c95ccfdceb2dfbe9a7f46f127721229.png)

**🔮Why You’ll Love It:**

Perfect for builders and recyclers alike — turn leftover bottles into something useful instead of cluttering your inventory!

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
